name: [Finance] Team Hickenlooper
subject: Getting to 130,000
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Here's a harsh truth: If we don't stay on track to add 130,000 supporters to this team, the July debate could be John's last opportunity to take the stage. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771742/691c9bd/6d0070ec/11a47e3b/619737558/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, in just over two weeks, John will take the presidential debate stage once again. That night in Detroit will present another opportunity to share his vision of pragmatic, progressive collaboration with the nation and show why he stands out uniquely in this field.

**But here 's a harsh truth: If we don't stay on track to add 130,000 supporters to this team, the July debate could be John's last opportunity to take the stage.**

To grow this team to the size we need to get John to the fall debates, we need just one donation from _every single person on this team --even $1 is enough_.

**We don 't currently have a record of support associated with this email address. If you haven't chipped in to support John yet, can you do so right now?** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190715_FTH_20190715-fr-FTH-onedollar-ndnr_ndnr_expresslane1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=1&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you,
Finance Team
Team Hickenlooper **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_201906715_JH_20190715-fr-JH-corn-all_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771742/691c9bd/6d0070ec/11a47e36/619737558/VEsC/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771742/691c9bd/6d0070ec/11a47e37/619737558/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771742/691c9bd/6d0070ec/11a47e34/619737558/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771742/691c9bd/6d0070ec/11a47e35/619737558/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771742/691c9bd/6d0070ec/11a47e32/619737558/VEsO/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").

name: Kamala HQ
subject: I’ll be honest
body:
I’ll be honest: our
fundraising is already dipping this month and we need to work twice as
hard to play catch up.

The fundraising team is scrambling to make sure our budget stays on track
every single day. I’ve done the math, and if we don’t meet our mid-month target,
we may need to make some serious cuts at a time when Kamala’s campaign has
real momentum.

This grassroots team has stepped up before and I’m counting on you again.
Donate before midnight tomorrow to help us catch up and get back on track
this month.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190715-mm?refcode=ema190715-mm-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5589_5755789_neclP4&akid=5589%2E5755789%2EneclP4 ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190715-mm?refcode=ema190715-mm-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=5589_5755789_neclP4&akid=5589%2E5755789%2EneclP4 ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190715-mm?refcode=ema190715-mm-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=5589_5755789_neclP4&akid=5589%2E5755789%2EneclP4 ]Another Amount

Trust me, I know how many of these emails you get (I get them, too!). But
I promise, I wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t really, really
important.

Kamala has never run for president before. She doesn’t have a war chest of
campaign money ready to go. Plus, she’s not accepting a dime from
corporate PACs or federal lobbyists.

So, when I say we’re depending on your grassroot support, it’s no joke.

Your donation goes directly toward keeping Kamala on the campaign trail
talking to voters and sharing our vision of a country that works for ALL
people. If you can, please make a
donation now to help us before our mid-month deadline tomorrow.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

Finance Team
Kamala 2020

body:
Can we host as many town halls as we want to? Can we hire as many organizers as we need to win? Can we buy more ads to get the word out about Elizabeth's big ideas -- so that we can grow our... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852effa/45c30650/1482f2fe6/669c816d/725730274/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Here's a glimpse behind the curtain that a lot of other campaigns don't want you to see:

Candidates regularly ask for money from ultra-wealthy donors. They spend tons of their time at exclusive fundraisers that are closed to the public, offering special access to those who donate the most money.

**But it doesn 't have to be that way.** Elizabeth is committed to doing things differently -- and this campaign isn't holding closed-door fundraisers or selling her time to big donors.

**Instead, we rely on supporters like you to grow our movement nationwide. If you want to show that we can keep running a fully grassroots funded campaign, can you chip in right now?** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
**Working at the grassroots level is the best way to build our team for the long haul, but it takes real resources. As we move into the second half of 2019, we have some big decisions to make.**

Can we host as many town halls as we want to? Can we hire as many organizers as we need to win? Can we buy more ads to get the word out about Elizabeth's big ideas -- so that we can grow our grassroots movement for big, structural change?

That's why we send emails like this one. With every email, you have the chance to own a piece of this campaign. And you can help answer those questions.

**This campaign is only accountable to grassroots supporters, not the rich and powerful. Everyone owns an equal piece of what we 're building together, no matter what you can contribute.

[You're an important part of this team, and we couldn't be more thankful for your support in this fight. Can you chip in today to our campaign and grow our movement to help Elizabeth create bold, structural change?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852effa/45c30650/1482f2fe6/669c8159/725730274/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDcxNWVtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190715em2-full")**

Thanks for being in this fight,

Team Warren

****[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852effa/45c30650/1482f2fe6/669c8159/725730274/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDcxNWVtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190715em2-full")****

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: It’s all about ‘Made in America’
body:
“Washington used to say these jobs weren’t coming back. They were wrong!” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ad93dd79e9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 15, 2019
---
| | |
# **It’s all about ‘Made in America’**

**It’s Made in America Day,** and President Donald J. Trump celebrated by hosting his third annual Made in America Showcase—an exhibition on the White House lawn of manufacturers from all 50 states.

**“Washington used** to say these jobs weren’t coming back. They were wrong!” [Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f9a15e366&e=3ee4985eea) tweeted this afternoon.

**🎬****Watch:**[Handmade motorcycles straight from America’s heartland!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b040c8a0ff&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump** is making sure that Americans’ own Federal Government continues to put them first, as well. Earlier today, he signed an executive order to strengthen requirements under the Buy American Act, which creates a preference for American-made goods in important Federal purchases.

**“The philosophy** of my Administration is simple: If we can build it, grow it, or make it in the United States, we will,” he said.

**Businesses both big and small and** from a wide range of industries showcased their incredible work at the White House today. On display were Zippo lighters made in Pennsylvania, Airstream trailers made in Ohio, Buck Knives made in Idaho, and Nokona baseball gloves made in Texas.

**“When we choose American-made** , something truly wonderful happens: Our communities thrive and flourish, our neighborhoods bustle with commerce, our children dream bigger and bolder, and the bonds of loyalty that unite us as citizens become closer,” the President said.

**President Trump** is ushering in a new age of American manufacturing as factories roar back to life and blue-collar workers thrive. Manufacturing job growth soared to a more than two-decade high in 2018, bringing opportunity to communities that had been left behind. The future looks even brighter: Manufacturer optimism has skyrocketed under President Trump, reaching a new record high last year.

[Read President Trump’s Proclamation for Made in America Day and Week.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1bf83bbd78&e=3ee4985eea)

**Peter Navarro:** [President Trump continues to deliver on his promise to 'Buy American, Hire American'](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=590331ae42&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump takes more action to stop the surge of illegal immigration**

**President Trump** took action today to stop illegal immigrants from using meritless asylum claims as a free pass to illegally enter our country.

**The Administration’s** new rule will make aliens ineligible for asylum if they passed through another country on their way to our border without applying for protection. These asylum-seekers will be required to demonstrate that they applied for protection in at least one country and were denied before they can obtain such status in the United States.

**Our asylum system** has been used as a loophole by aliens to gain entry into the United States and remain here indefinitely—even though their claims are often meritless. The median asylum grant rate across all immigration courts is about 11 percent.

**“Until Congress can act,** this interim rule will help reduce a major 'pull' factor driving irregular migration to the United States and enable DHS and DOJ to more quickly and efficiently process cases originating from the southern border, leading to fewer individuals transiting through Mexico on a dangerous journey,” Acting Homeland Security Secretary Kevin McAleenan said in a statement.

[DHS and DOJ Issue Third-Country Asylum Rule](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f532ae4140&e=3ee4985eea).

**Former top immigration official:** [“Here are some facts that these Democrats don’t want you to know”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fbfb79227b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

| **President Donald J. Trump speaks with Freeman Boatworks of Summerville, South Carolina, at the White House’s Third Annual Made In America Showcase** | July 15, 2019

name: =?utf-8?q?Jen_O=E2=80=99Malley_Dillon=2C_Beto_for_America?=
subject: Where we go from here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
I joined this campaign because I believe in Beto and I know he is the best person to lead our country forward. This country is facing existential challenges like climate change, economic inequality, gun violence and Trump's immigration policies that have caused chaos at the border and rejected our values as a country. Beto believes that we can't solve these problems with the same old approach. We need to bring about a new kind of politics, where millions of Americans are finally brought into our democracy.
**This campaign is your campaign.** We aren't beholden to PACs, to corporations, or to lobbyists; we're beholden only to you. We believe in being transparent about our work and our plans — and we want to hear from you too. It's going to take all of us to take on Donald Trump and your voice in this campaign really matters to us. Because of that, I wanted to give my first campaign update directly to you.
I am so proud of what we are building together, so let's get into it!
**Here's what we've got:**
* **Our candidate:** Someone who inspires and motivates people with policies to back it up.
* **Our team:** No exaggeration, one of the best teams I've ever worked with.
* **Our strategy:** Building this grassroots movement in Iowa, early states and across this country.
* **Texas:** It's got the third most delegates of any state in the country, and we're in the best position to win it.
* **Our plan for the fall:** We've already met the hardest threshold for the fall debate. We're in on individual donors both nationally and in states.
* **Our resources:** We always need more, but we have enough to execute our strategy — for now.
* **Our most critical asset: You.** We've got amazing supporters who are engaged, energized, and putting in the work every single day.

Not only is this campaign about you, it's run by you. We're building a truly grassroots-centric campaign operation, inspired by what many of you helped build last year in Texas. This couldn't be more apparent than by taking a look at what we are building in Iowa and the early states. In fact, our organizing program is currently one of the largest in the state. Some of you may have seen that we opened 11 field offices there — today. And sure, we've got incredibly experienced and diverse staff. We've also got amazingly dedicated volunteers and supporters who are serving as ambassadors for Beto in their own networks and communities. Together, we're making the difference. **Here's where we are:**
**Organizing by the numbers:**
* **Grassroots events held:** 3,551
* **Event attendees:** More than 47,486 (31,454 in Q2)
* **Volunteers:** 102,896
* **States we've canvassed in:** 50

**Fundraising:**
A lot of folks have asked about our fundraising numbers. Overall, here's where we are:
We had something of an extended Q2. Our Q1 numbers came from the 18 days in March where you all stepped up big time. When you look at our fundraising in aggregate, we're in a great position. I won't sugar coat it: we have work to do, **but we have the resources we need to execute our strategy.**
And we're proud of where that money is coming from. This is a campaign that is truly funded by people — not PACs, lobbyists, or special interests. Take a look:
Some people in this race are already setting up super PACs. We haven't. Instead, we're relying on teachers, nurses, students, and people just like you. Beyond, we have tons of room to grow: 99.7% of our donors can give again, and most importantly a full 1/3rd of our donors gave to Beto for the first time — presidential or Senate — in Q2.
The way we raised on day one took everyone — including us — by surprise. We always expected a slow down — mostly because we never expected to be moving that fast. The truth is when you're prioritizing face-to-face conversations like we are, fundraising growth can be a slow burn. Don't believe me? Here's the fundraising arc from Beto's Senate race.
If you only judged Beto's Senate campaign by Q2 2017, you'd probably assume he was dead in the water. I've done a lot of these before. Campaigns aren't about how you're doing at any particular moment — they're about how you build over time.
We're building our team in El Paso slowly but surely. Our National Finance Director started this week. Our Digital Director started a month ago. We're going to grow, and our ability to fundraise is going to grow with it. Our team was able to capture all of the energy around our launch, but we're working on getting a team in place to take it to the next level.
We could have sent emails that said the sky was falling. We could have burned it all down asking for money. We could have had Beto on the phones with every lobbyist in town. That's not how we operate — and we don't feel like we need to. Instead, we raised money for more than a dozen down-ballot candidates. On the last day of the quarter, we raised money for an organization that helps asylum seekers. I'm so proud that this campaign raised tens of thousands of dollars for Diocesan Migrant and Refugee Services of El Paso [(and you can give to them here.)](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18064?refcode=beto-ema20190715-40670&t=1&akid=40670%2E444211%2EcIw2IE)
That's the campaign we're running. That's who Beto is, and that's why we all know he should be President.
I've been here before. Hell, if I had a dollar for every time I was on a campaign that seemed left for dead, I'd probably exceed our average contribution. Polls come and go. Debates...happen, but at the end of the day, none of that BS matters. What matters is the people behind a campaign: supporters like you — the (literally) thousands of you who just showed up in Nashville on the Sunday of a holiday weekend. The folks who are out canvassing the state of Nebraska themselves. Even the dogs who show up in Beto shirts at a parade — and I don't even really like dogs. This is a campaign with a real energy, real growth, and a real shot at winning the primary. The only question is what we do with it — together.
**So here's what I'm asking of you:**
**First, we need to raise more money.** It should be clear by now that we can't take anything for granted. We have the resources we need to be in this for the long haul, but if we don't raise more this quarter, we'll have no choice but to make some adjustments. [Please pitch in $3 right now to help us invest in this campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18133?refcode=ema20190715-40670&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=40670%2E444211%2EcIw2IE)
**Second: Go and volunteer right now.** We simply cannot get over the finish line without you. The grassroots energy we've seen on the ground has been overwhelming. We feel it at every event we have for this campaign — whether Beto is there or not. [Find an event in your community or host your own.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17167?source=ema20190715-40670&zipcode=34223&t=3&akid=40670%2E444211%2EcIw2IE)
**Third: Get online.** Share with your friends why you support Beto and why you're a part of this team. We can spend all the money on ads we want, but no one is going to be better at bringing people into this campaign than you.
**I want to be very clear:** We are growing the campaign on our terms. I am thrilled with what we're building together — and I mean that. It's easy to look at what's in the press and feel like your work isn't paying off. I'm here to tell you that it is. Every conversation you have, door you knock, post you share, and dollar you donate is helping us build an operation that will not only win this primary, but will defeat Donald Trump and make everyone in this country believe again that we can rise to this moment.
Beto likes to say that this is a moment of truth for our country. Fundamentally reimagining our politics was never going to be easy, but I'm more resolved than ever to fight everyday to make it happen. This is just the beginning. Believe it.
I'm so glad we're in this together.
Jen O'Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager, Beto for America
**[Contribute »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18133?refcode=ema20190715-40670&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40670%2E444211%2EcIw2IE)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=40670%2E444211%2EcIw2IE). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: What we did when they said we couldn't
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
We're putting working people first.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf212de/1630b3eb/513f8998/5f55602c/4148149046/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=org_em_welcome")

Friend --
Thank you so much for joining a group of bold everyday Americans who are just plain tired of getting screwed. It's blunt, but it's the truth. Working people are getting screwed by big corporations, and too often they're getting screwed by their own government.
Working people in this country deserve better -- and on this team, we know we can make it happen [because we've already done it in New York City.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf212de/1630b3eb/513f8998/5f55602c/4148149046/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=org_em_welcome")
[HELP US KEEP FIGHTING »](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf212de/1630b3eb/513f8998/5f55602c/4148149046/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=org_em_welcome")
---
As mayor of the largest city in America -- larger than 39 entire states -- I watched my neighbors wait a long time for Washington to fix the issues our nation is facing. When Washington wouldn't act, we decided to go ahead anyway. Now we have a $15 minimum wage, paid sick leave and guaranteed health care -- including mental health services.
Everyone loved the idea of Universal Pre-K, but naysayers said we couldn't afford it. We made it a priority and, within two years, ensured every four-year-old in our city receives the same start to their education, saving working parents tens of thousands of dollars in childcare expenses.
**It 's time to finally put working people first in this country**. And I'm so excited about what we're going to get done together. But we're already approaching our campaign's first make-or-break challenge: reaching the 65,000-donor threshold to ensure we qualify for the Democratic debates.
[Donate $1 now to help ensure our proven working-families-first agenda gets a shot on the Democratic debate stage. ](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf212de/1630b3eb/513f8998/5f55602c/4148149046/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=org_em_welcome")
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf212de/1630b3eb/513f8998/5f55602c/4148149046/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=org_em_welcome")

The problems our nation is facing are urgent. That's why we're not sitting around making plans for how to solve things; we're solving them now. We're not watering down our goals to try to win over the people who made this mess possible; we're setting and achieving bold, progressive goals now. We're moving forward -- and when we move forward together, we win.
[Can you help us take one more step toward our urgent 65,000-donor goal? Donate $1 now to help ensure our voices are heard at the Democratic debates.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf212de/1630b3eb/513f8998/5f55602c/4148149046/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=org_em_welcome")
Whenever someone tells me we can't prioritize solutions that will help working people live better, safer, happier and more prosperous lives, this is what I tell them: There's plenty of money in the world. It's just in the wrong hands.
Thank you for lending me a hand,
Bill de Blasio
New York City Mayor
Candidate for U.S. President

clean_body: We're putting working people first. "" Friend -- Thank you so much for joining a group of bold everyday Americans who are just plain tired of getting screwed. It's blunt, but it's the truth. Working people are getting screwed by big corporations, and too often they're getting screwed by their own government. Working people in this country deserve better -- and on this team, we know we can make it happen "" "" As mayor of the largest city in America -- larger than 39 entire states -- I watched my neighbors wait a long time for Washington to fix the issues our nation is facing. When Washington wouldn't act, we decided to go ahead anyway. Now we have a $15 minimum wage, paid sick leave and guaranteed health care -- including mental health services. Everyone loved the idea of Universal Pre-K, but naysayers said we couldn't afford it. We made it a priority and, within two years, ensured every four-year-old in our city receives the same start to their education, saving working parents tens of thousands of dollars in childcare expenses. It 's time to finally put working people first in this country. And I'm so excited about what we're going to get done together. But we're already approaching our campaign's first make-or-break challenge: reaching the 65,000-donor threshold to ensure we qualify for the Democratic debates. "" "" "" The problems our nation is facing are urgent. That's why we're not sitting around making plans for how to solve things; we're solving them now. We're not watering down our goals to try to win over the people who made this mess possible; we're setting and achieving bold, progressive goals now. We're moving forward -- and when we move forward together, we win. "" Whenever someone tells me we can't prioritize solutions that will help working people live better, safer, happier and more prosperous lives, this is what I tell them: There's plenty of money in the world. It's just in the wrong hands. Thank you for lending me a hand, Bill de Blasio New York City Mayor Candidate for U.S. President "" PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

One of the most pressing issues facing people across our district - and our country - is the cost of prescription medications. Far too many families are deciding between paying for their prescriptions or paying their rent or saving for their retirement. to lower prescription drug costs"**](https://act.myngp.com/el/yXB6hJnQLpLcwW4P5hSGe0_vvuUWoCkXIkwKDcP2LgA=/rVtUPOlsyRXSd2X0MBPp0m6I5lBhmVp10Z9Y55hOxSg=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190716-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=25,50,100,250,500)

name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Stand For Rural Healthcare Tour
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z44YwFzAn4JErJTfrmLpY2Z0xXV3XtEOOpa43X0hVkg=/Fqy-G7aj0vkzfEMVLv01jyEqhyDvJOhKNwYLhAbNfUg=) Dear Peter, Democrats are working to solve issues facing all Tennesseans, including rural Tennessee families who, because of hospital closures and a lack of health care access, are being negatively affected at an unprecedented rate. The bottom line is, no family can thrive and no community can prosper without access to health insurance or emergency medical services. Rural Tennessee communities deserve real, thoughtful solutions to what is the biggest threat to the rural way of life, which is why we're launching a statewide tour of the areas most affected by Tennessee's health care crisis and rural hospital closures. During the month of August, the **TNDP Stand For Rural Healthcare Tour **will visit these communities and listen to and amplify the stories of the people who live there. More details regarding programs, speakers, and event locations will follow. To get involved as a storyteller, speaker, volunteer, or organizer during one of the stops, let us know by filling out this **[form](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z44YwFzAn4JErJTfrmLpY2Z0xXV3XtEOOpa43X0hVkg=/RIrUWkPjiIAwmQlfThsf9rbI43MWBL8A9ycrPWcb_m0=?usp=sf_link)** or email Trevon Sylvester at trevon@tndp.org. Dates and locations for the Stand For Rural Healthcare Tour are as follows: **Middle Tennessee** Coffee County: Saturday, August 3 Clay County: Monday, August 5 Fentress County: Tuesday, August 6 East Tennessee Knox County: Thursday, August 8 Polk County: Friday, August 9 McMinn County: Saturday, August 10 Marion County: Monday, August 12 Hamblen County: Tuesday, August 13 West Tennessee Gibson County: Thursday, August 15 Lauderdale County: Friday, August 16 Haywood County: Saturday, August 17 Fayette County: Sunday, August 18 McNairy County: Monday, August 19 Carroll County: Tuesday, August 20 *Check our [Facebook events page](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z44YwFzAn4JErJTfrmLpY2Z0xXV3XtEOOpa43X0hVkg=/flbfuvg1ab7HgAgrsznfKkccvlVO7gSX71VxBUTUrho=?ref=page_internal) periodically for details on East and West Tennessee tour stops. All the best,
Mary \--
Mary Mancini

clean_body: | | = Dear Peter, Democrats are working to solve issues facing all Tennesseans, including rural Tennessee families who, because of hospital closures and a lack of health care access, are being negatively affected at an unprecedented rate. The bottom line is, no family can thrive and no community can prosper without access to health insurance or emergency medical services. Rural Tennessee communities deserve real, thoughtful solutions to what is the biggest threat to the rural way of life, which is why we're launching a statewide tour of the areas most affected by Tennessee's health care crisis and rural hospital closures. During the month of August, the TNDP Stand For Rural Healthcare Tour will visit these communities and listen to and amplify the stories of the people who live there. More details regarding programs, speakers, and event locations will follow. To get involved as a storyteller, speaker, volunteer, or organizer during one of the stops, let us know by filling out this or email Trevon Sylvester at trevon@tndp.org. Dates and locations for the Stand For Rural Healthcare Tour are as follows: Middle Tennessee Coffee County: Saturday, August 3 Clay County: Monday, August 5 Fentress County: Tuesday, August 6 East Tennessee Knox County: Thursday, August 8 Polk County: Friday, August 9 McMinn County: Saturday, August 10 Marion County: Monday, August 12 Hamblen County: Tuesday, August 13 West Tennessee Gibson County: Thursday, August 15 Lauderdale County: Friday, August 16 Haywood County: Saturday, August 17 Fayette County: Sunday, August 18 McNairy County: Monday, August 19 Carroll County: Tuesday, August 20 Check our periodically for details on East and West Tennessee tour stops. name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Let’s be clear: it IS racism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
My friend,

Whether it's President Donald Trump telling four minority members of Congress to "go back" to their countries, or incumbent Republican Congressman Pete Olson calling me an "Indo-American carpetbagger" last year, Trump and his Republican Party are sending us a loud and clear message: we're less American than they are.

**[Help me send them a crystal-clear ](https://act.myngp.com/el/91t2I2X3vUjVHgzkXWJXUswjI2YCfRO83Zezu1cgq1I=/qdr9_iJCMdTZCuD71kJ42ZJcVZK6fOIlNJi0sT9kbHw=?refcode=0716)****[reply : Truly representing America means standing up for ALL Americans, ](https://act.myngp.com/el/91t2I2X3vUjVHgzkXWJXUswjI2YCfRO83Zezu1cgq1I=/qdr9_iJCMdTZCuD71kJ42ZJcVZK6fOIlNJi0sT9kbHw=?refcode=0716)**[**every day. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/91t2I2X3vUjVHgzkXWJXUswjI2YCfRO83Zezu1cgq1I=/qdr9_iJCMdTZCuD71kJ42ZJcVZK6fOIlNJi0sT9kbHw=?refcode=0716)

When Fox News pushed out a conspiracy theory that our first black President faked his birth certificate, we were told it's not racism. When candidate Trump said a Latino judge couldn't rule on a fraud case, we were told it's not racism. When white nationalist terrorist attacks were ignored as brown people were singled out and candidate Trump called for banning an entire faith from our nation, we were told that it's not racism. Categorizing other nations as "S-hole African countries": not racism. Black athletes are "sons of b-tches": not racism. People who attended a Nazi rally where men were yelling "Jews will not replace us!" and a woman was brutally murdered were "very fine people" according to President Trump: not racism again.

**[If you believe we're better than this, that the bigotry being openly promoted by our elected leaders is un-American, please do something about it today and join me in my mission to defeat Pete Olson and give everyone in this District the voice they deserve in Congress.](https://act.myngp.com/el/91t2I2X3vUjVHgzkXWJXUswjI2YCfRO83Zezu1cgq1I=/qdr9_iJCMdTZCuD71kJ42ZJcVZK6fOIlNJi0sT9kbHw=?refcode=0716)**

No matter where you consider yourself on the political spectrum, we must all stand together against bigotry and racism.
**
[I'm doing something about it by running for Congress. Join me in standing up for an America where everyone is treated equally, with dignity and respect.](https://act.myngp.com/el/91t2I2X3vUjVHgzkXWJXUswjI2YCfRO83Zezu1cgq1I=/qdr9_iJCMdTZCuD71kJ42ZJcVZK6fOIlNJi0sT9kbHw=?refcode=0716)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/91t2I2X3vUjVHgzkXWJXUswjI2YCfRO83Zezu1cgq1I=/qdr9_iJCMdTZCuD71kJ42ZJcVZK6fOIlNJi0sT9kbHw=?refcode=0716)

In solidarity,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

* * *

Paid for by Sri for Congress.
---
Sri for Congress
PO Box 898
Sugar Land TX 77478 United States

name: Megan West
subject: INTERVIEW: Frustrated by the news? Get a new perspective.
body:
| | An Interview with Dr. Dension
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k38p0cRpdzusf2-Q3M3f3eI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190716com01&n=1)
| Peter, Do you ever watch or read the news and find yourself frustrated, not knowing what you can do to make a difference? It’s often not clear how we can practically approach the news from a Biblical perspective. We sat down with Dr. Jim Denison, founder of the Denison Forum and an expert on discerning the news differently in a way that equips a movement of culture-changing Christians. Dr. Dension writes a [daily article](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=JHbrYXty3U_p-dPsbnIIMnbl1LDEdnQ0HKpWS30ILy_o-TNDckw1urSGfYCgWkQZmAkTMey1Oqx3sIjTafekmQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190716com01&n=2) based on the day’s news, which helps Christians think critically and ask themselves, “What can I do to make a difference on this issue?” _“We believe that culture changes top-down. It changes when you achieve your highest place of influence and live there faithfully.”_ – Dr. Jim Denison [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k38p0cRpdzusf2-Q3M3f3eI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190716com01&n=3) [Watch our interview](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k38p0cRpdzusf2-Q3M3f3eI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190716com01&n=4) to hear how you can interpret the news differently and better understand the issues in a way that pleases God. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k38p0cRpdzusf2-Q3M3f3eI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190716com01&n=5) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190716com01&n=6)
---

name: Gary Peters
subject: looking for your input
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Back in 2010, when I voted for the Affordable Care Act as a first-term congressman, Republicans threatened to end my political career. A decade later, they're still trying to take me down.

| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dac82/5721a3ed/730b896c/ef9af03/272627732/VEsH/ "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,

Back in 2010, when I voted for the Affordable Care Act as a first-term congressman, Republicans threatened to end my political career. A decade later, they're still trying to take me down. It's a real ugly part of politics, but do you know why I keep fighting? Because more than 20 million Americans nationwide gained health insurance from the ACA, including 1.2 million Michiganders. It has literally saved lives.

Unfortunately, my opponent has called the Affordable Care Act a "monstrosity" and vowed to end it. He wants to take us back to the days when insurance companies called the shots and could make care unaffordable for those with pre-existing conditions. With Mitch McConnell and President Trump also trying to dismantle the ACA, it's no wonder my opponent is their handpicked candidate. He said he backs the president "2,000%."

I don't back any extreme political agenda. I back Michigan, and I'm determined to keep working hard for Michigan families in the Senate. **That 's why I want to hear what's top of mind for folks. [_Will you take a moment to take my survey and let me know which issues are most important to you and your family?_](https://secure.petersformichigan. "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-priorities-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2-su-nd")**

Let's be clear: This will be the toughest reelection campaign I've faced. The GOP knows that defeating me in Michigan means Democrats can't take back the Senate. They're counting on my opponent to win so they can finally dismantle our health care system that protects those with pre-existing conditions once and for all.

I've won tough races before, and I've been successful thanks to supporters like you rallying beside me. That's why it's so important to get your feedback. Winning takes all of us speaking out and standing up for what matters. **[_So, will you click here and let me know what 's on your mind?_](https://secure.petersformichigan. "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-priorities-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2-su-nd")**

Thank you for sharing your thoughts. I'm so glad to have you on this team.

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dac82/5721a3ed/730b896c/ef9af01/272627732/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth, and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dac82/5721a3ed/730b896c/ef9af00/272627732/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dac82/5721a3ed/730b896c/ef9af1f/272627732/VEsA/ "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dac82/5721a3ed/730b896c/ef9af1e/272627732/VEsB/ "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dac82/5721a3ed/730b896c/ef9af01/272627732/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dac82/5721a3ed/730b896c/ef9af00/272627732/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

name: Team Hood
subject: a new challenge
body:
|
---
Thanks to your support, we were able to meet our last quarterly fundraising goal and fight back against our opponents' attacks. But now we have a new challenge, and we need to meet it to stay in front in Jim's race for governor: we need 300 July donors by tomorrow night so that we can keep our lead.
Friend,

Thanks to your support, we were able to meet our last quarterly fundraising goal and fight back against our opponents' attacks. But now we have a new challenge, and we need to meet it to stay on track in Jim's race for governor: _we need 300 July donors by tomorrow night so that we can keep our lead._

While Tate Reeves depends on huge out-of-state corporations to support his campaign, we depend on the support of voters across Mississippi. **Will you chip in $5 now to help us reach tomorrow 's mid-month goal of 300 donors?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Cruelty as a deterrent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-immigration-reform?refcode=em_header&noskip=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-immigration-reform?refcode=em_header&noskip=true]
Friend,
Separating families fleeing extreme crime, poverty, and violence must not be who we are as a country. Putting children in cages to score political points with your base would have been unthinkable before Trump — but here we are.
The Trump administration’s zero-tolerance policies use cruelty as a deterrent. As your senator, I will always speak up when immigrants are under attack.
Locking people in cages, separating children from their families, and neglecting their basic human needs to the point that people are dying from preventable illness in U.S. custody is a moral outrage and failing of our government. Add your name if you agree. [https://teresatomlinson.com/fight-for-immigration-reform/?refcode=em071619a&noskip=true&emci=b3d0fe1c-f9a7-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=b4d0fe1c-f9a7-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=HmQ8aJ5DOzLnLP7TJitVqYw7fX9XcZwydhmeKzuNdYJVfLrVOIXiCMy9mNZV5TUSUB124ZJ1jQ77Tw1DA7c%2FJ8PIMz7PuUFyjt8GG4y9Rwk%3D]
SIGN HERE [https://teresatomlinson.com/fight-for-immigration-reform/?refcode=em071619a&noskip=true&emci=b3d0fe1c-f9a7-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=b4d0fe1c-f9a7-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=HmQ8aJ5DOzLnLP7TJitVqYw7fX9XcZwydhmeKzuNdYJVfLrVOIXiCMy9mNZV5TUSUB124ZJ1jQ77Tw1DA7c%2FJ8PIMz7PuUFyjt8GG4y9Rwk%3D]
As your U.S. Senator, I will fight to:
Immediately end the Family Separation Policy
Protect DREAMers and DACA recipients
Create a just and humane asylum process
Invest resources to increase border security
Restore aid to Guatemala, Honduras, and El Salvador — addressing this problem at the source, instead of at our southern border
I wept when I listened to the audio of a 6-year-old girl being held in federal detention pleading with ICE agents to allow her to call her aunt.
But while my heart was broken, my resolve was not.
There are solutions available to us — bipartisan solutions — but Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans like David Perdue won’t allow them to come for a vote.
Our urgent need for comprehensive immigration reform has never been more clear. Together we will win a Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate and finally pass comprehensive immigration reform that reflects the best of America, not the worst.
Stand and fight with me today. [https://teresatomlinson.com/fight-for-immigration-reform/?refcode=em071619a&noskip=true&emci=b3d0fe1c-f9a7-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=b4d0fe1c-f9a7-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=HmQ8aJ5DOzLnLP7TJitVqYw7fX9XcZwydhmeKzuNdYJVfLrVOIXiCMy9mNZV5TUSUB124ZJ1jQ77Tw1DA7c%2FJ8PIMz7PuUFyjt8GG4y9Rwk%3D]
Teresa
<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/fight-for-immigration-reform-em071619/]
PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

| **TPM: Trump Doubles Down On 'Go Back' Attack: 'If You Don't Like It' Here, 'You Can Leave'**

_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Condemn President Trump's racist attacks against women of color in Congress!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd9d/693b8b0a/4789774b/72de8345/3396519288/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/denounce-trump-racist-attacks?source=071619_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

**[SIGN THE PETITION](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd9d/693b8b0a/4789774b/72de8345/3396519288/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/denounce-trump-racist-attacks?source=071619_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
Hello,

On Sunday, Donald Trump viciously attacked four women of color in Congress, including Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Illhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and Massachusetts' Ayanna Pressley, telling them to "go back" to where they came from.

Then yesterday, he doubled down on his bigoted attacks, going even further to tell Americans that if they don't like living here, they can leave too.

Bigotry like this doesn't belong in our country or the White House.

I'm standing with Reps. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Illhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and Ayanna Pressley to condemn President Trump's racist attacks.

_**[Please join me by signing our petition today to denounce President Trump.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd9d/693b8b0a/4789774b/72de8345/3396519288/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/denounce-trump-racist-attacks?source=071619_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

**[SIGN THE PETITION](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd9d/693b8b0a/4789774b/72de8345/3396519288/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/denounce-trump-racist-attacks?source=071619_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
Thanks,

Ed

name: Caitlin, TULSI2020
subject: We did it!!! RE: We’re almost at 100k donors!!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TULSI NOW ]
body:
--TULSI 2020--

We did it, Friend!

Late Sunday night, we received a contribution from our 100,000th individual donor!

We were so busy celebrating, we forgot to send this email out yesterday — joking, we were working — can't rest on our laurels!

Because as excited as we are to pass this milestone, we still have work to do: 30,000 more individuals need to donate $1 or more in order for Tulsi to qualify to be on the debate stage in September.

Click here to share this 30 second video of our progress on Facebook and give your friends a chance to join our movement. [https://www.facebook.com/TulsiGabbard/videos/426613301529689/]

Woohoo!

- Caitlin

[ PAID FOR BY TULSI NOW ]

PO Box 75255 Kapolei HI 96707

The truth is that email is one of the most important tools we have to update supporters like you. It is one way we come together as a community of progressives to make change in this world. Should you want to unsubscribe—and we would hate to see you leave— go here [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fd60f75a-d2a7-e911-bcd0-281878391efb/a53e0967-fea7-e911-bcd0-281878391efb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTNlMDk2Ny1mZWE3LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LJqx3kh625vIWGovvr4b57Ff1hKydB9p5sDlEnopr3Y=&id=101199451&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com] . Finally, if you believe we need to end the culture of corruption and greed in Washington, then now is the time to make a contribution to TULSI 2020 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tulsi2020?refcode=em-footer] . If you'd like to make a recurring contribution to TULSI 2020, please click here [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tulsi2020?recurring=yes&refcode=em-footer] .

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Add your name to my resolution with AOC: “There is a climate emergency which demands a massive-scale mobilization to halt, reverse, and address its consequences and causes.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
We must act decisively on climate change. Humanity is at stake. That is why Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and I introduced this resolution in Congress.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=2144%2E150750%2E2DqpCG)
Sisters, Brothers, and Friends -
Climate change is an existential threat to humanity. Last week, I introduced with Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez a resolution in Congress declaring climate change to be a national emergency. I am writing to ask for your support for this idea. This is how our resolution starts:
**There is a climate emergency which demands a massive-scale mobilization to halt, reverse, and address its consequences and causes.**
[**If you agree that climate change is an existential threat, and that we must take urgent, immediate action on this emergency, please add your name to mine right now.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/climate_emergency/?source=em190716-2-ccre-250k&refcode2=2144.150750.2DqpCG&t=2&akid=2144%2E150750%2E2DqpCG)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/climate_emergency/?source=em190716-2-ccre-250k&refcode2=2144.150750.2DqpCG&t=3&akid=2144%2E150750%2E2DqpCG)
Climate change is real, it is caused by human activity, and it is already causing devastating harm to the United States and countries around the world.
Last week, parts of Washington, DC experienced nearly unprecedented flooding because of a rain storm. Devastating storms regularly rip across the Midwest at increasing scale. Alaska had 90 degree temperatures last weekend, which was the hottest ever recorded.
Yet it is not just the United States. All over the world, you see communities displaced by climate change. People suffer daily because of floods, storms, and more.
Let's be clear. Failure to act decisively on climate change will mean more drought, more famine, more rising sea levels, more floods, more ocean acidification, more extreme weather disturbances, more disease and more human suffering. Climate change is about our survival of the human race.
The good news is that we now have the knowledge and technology to address climate change, and it starts with creating an international energy system that is clean, efficient, and sustainable. The bad news is that we are up against the fossil fuel industry, which is one of the most powerful political forces in the country.
They spend hundreds of millions of dollars on campaigns and lobbying every election cycle to protect their interests, while they continue to lie and deny the reality of climate change. And they make billions in profits by continuing to pump, refine, and burn oil, while future generations will be forced to deal with the catastrophic consequences of climate change.
It is past time for the United States to call climate change what it is: an emergency that is an existential threat to humanity that requires an urgent, massive response.
In doing so, we will be going against the fossil fuel industry’s army of lobbyists, PACs, and bought-and-sold legislators. But that is a fight worth having.
The only way that we can be successful in the fight against climate change is if the American people stand up to the fossil fuel industry and make their voices heard. So I’m asking you today:
[**Add your name if you agree the United States must declare an emergency on climate change and take immediate, large-scale action to reverse its effects. This is an existential threat.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/climate_emergency/?source=em190716-2-ccre-250k&refcode2=2144.150750.2DqpCG&t=4&akid=2144%2E150750%2E2DqpCG)
We have a president who not only believes that climate change is a hoax perpetrated by the Chinese government, but is pursuing policies which make a frightening situation even worse. Further, we have a major political party, the Republican Party, that marches in lockstep behind the ignorance of the president.
But in our campaign, we have an opportunity for the U.S. to be a leader in the global fight against climate change.
Thank you for being a part of this fight.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/climate_emergency/?source=em190716-2-ccre-250k&refcode2=2144.150750.2DqpCG&t=5&akid=2144%2E150750%2E2DqpCG)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=2144%2E150750%2E2DqpCG). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=2144%2E150750%2E2DqpCG). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=2144_150750_2DqpCG&akid=2144%2E150750%2E2DqpCG).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=9&akid=2144%2E150750%2E2DqpCG).

subject: BREAKING: Georgia is one of the LIKELIEST TO FLIP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
| |
---

#
**_The Washington Post says that Georgia is one of the Democrats’ best pickup opportunities in 2020._

This confirms that national Democrats still have their eyes on Georgia.** Liberal groups are already running attack ads against me. Stacey Abrams is still raising and spending MILLIONS trying to turn Georgia into California. **Multiple Democrats have launched campaigns against me in the last week. **

**We must respond.** [**Will you rush a $20.20 donation – or whatever you can afford – right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=89e64e85de&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [RUSH DONATION >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=902b0fcd8b&e=02cd889ad3 "RUSH DONATION >>>")
---
| **The national liberal media, Chuck Schumer, and Stacey Abrams would like nothing more than for Georgia to be the state that hands Democrats the U.S. Senate majority AND the road to the White House.**

**I’m counting on you to help me fight back. **We need our supporters to send a clear message that the road to socialism will never run through the state of Georgia.

[**Please, become one of the first to pitch in $20.20 – or whatever you can afford – to our rapid response fund NOW! **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0ba01a8b34&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: the Grim Reaper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Mitch McConnell has doubled down on blocking progressive policies, saying that "If I'm still the majority leader in the Senate think of me as the Grim reaper. None of that stuff is going to pass."
Unfortunately, he's earned that nickname. From protecting _Roe v. Wade_ to taking action to combat the climate crisis, we can't move progressive policies forward with McConnell leading the Senate.
Democrat and Marine Corps veteran Amy McGrath just launched her campaign against him and we're helping her raise $8,000 by midnight to get her off on the right foot. Defeating McConnell is really important, so I'm asking for your help:

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump's Immigration Deal with Mexico is Working
body:
"The Democrats have underestimated President Trump yet again." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=27e6d56054&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump's Immigration Deal with Mexico is Working**

“The Democrats have underestimated President Trump yet again. His bilateral immigration deal with Mexico is already proving to be far more effective than his critics had predicted,” former Arizona Gov. Jan Brewer writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

“With Democrats in Congress still refusing to provide the necessary resources for border security despite the massive surge in illegal immigration that has taken place in recent months, Trump turned to Mexico as an unlikely partner to help get the humanitarian and national security crisis under control.”

The results speak for themselves. “Thanks to Mexico’s deployment of National Guard troops to intercept migrants on their way to the U.S. border, the number of illegal immigrants apprehended at the border declined significantly in June.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f37adbdabe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Two of the country’s staunchest big tech critics are asking the Federal Trade Commission to investigate social media companies’ perceived censorship practices,” Chris White writes in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f182a1bf59&e=3ee4985eea). “Facebook, Google, and Twitter exercise lots of influence on Americans and they also use their tools to censor some content while amplifying others,” Sens. Ted Cruz (R-TX) and Josh Hawley (R-MO) wrote in a letter Monday to the Federal Trade Commission.
---
|
---
| “U.S. factory output rose by more than expected in June on a solid gain in motor-vehicle production, suggesting American manufacturing is regaining a foothold,” Christopher Condon and Reade Pickert report for [_Bloomberg_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3675f8ca42&e=3ee4985eea). “The data, coming on the heels of better-than-projected retail sales figures earlier Tuesday, add to signs the economy is holding up amid steady gains in national employment and incomes.”
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration is working on multiple fronts to investigate and combat a rising tide of anti-Semitism in America that top officials warned is spreading across the country via a network of far left, anti-Israel activists, who seek to mainstream hatred against Jews at the nation's college campuses and elsewhere,” Adam Kredo reports for [_The Washington Free Beacon_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a1084c253&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “In open defiance of the law, both [Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi] and [former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton] have published guides for illegal immigrants who have already been ordered deported by a judge. These guides show illegal immigrants how they can avoid lawful deportation orders,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0bab941974&e=3ee4985eea). “Powerful people are intent on upending the rule of law. They would rather see the fabric that made our society the envy of the world torn to shreds, traded for personal power and political gain.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b137cafff&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b18bcfea8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=3048da9a64)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Pete Olson’s hypocrisy is unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
I emailed you earlier, but Pete Olson's hypocrisy cannot go unanswered.

Last cycle, incumbent Congressman Pete Olson called me an "Indo-American carpetbagger" who gets money "from overseas." Olson made false statements about 9/11 to stir up tensions and divide immigrant communities. Olson promoted a George Soros conspiracy the very same week that a man who believed in those conspiracies murdered eight people in a synagogue. When Pete Olson was asked why he said these things, he answered, "it's not racism, it's just politics."

Yet, after President Donald Trump tweeted that four sitting members of Congress should "go home" (three of which were born in America and the fourth moved here at age 12), Pete Olson called on Trump to disavow his comments.
Pete Olson's hypocrisy is NOT acceptable. If he is proud of the diversity of the 22nd District, then he needs to explain his words and actions from last year, disavow his own comments, and apologize to the people of this District.

**[Folks, if you agree that the bigotry, racism, and hypocrisy must end, then join us in our mission to defeat Pete Olson in 2020 and restore decency to our democracy.](https://act.myngp.com/el/RQuxQKnVOeqO1KFofGd6sLaPNXodoMI2nLGKzdWDNio=/rUwkwRudzct2XIVM2--6t9xMtG_aefwjonI0Y3nylcA=?refcode=0716)**

**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/RQuxQKnVOeqO1KFofGd6sLaPNXodoMI2nLGKzdWDNio=/rUwkwRudzct2XIVM2--6t9xMtG_aefwjonI0Y3nylcA=?refcode=0716)**

Standing up for EVERY American,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

clean_body: | | | | | Friend -- We've been excited about growth in the polls lately. The first poll that qualified Andrew for the fall debates was just last week. 2% is the threshold for that debate, and Andrew was able to clear that hurdle. Now, he's jumped even higher. \- described by a local activist as "gold" in the state - has Andrew at 5%. It's one of the biggest gains they saw. Andrew's message is beginning to separate him from the pack of candidates likely to drop out sometime ahead of the September debate. With polls like these, Andrew will be able to continue to fight for a new economy that puts humanity first. -Yang2020 | | | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Kamala 2020
subject: Kamala wanted to explain something to you
body:
We’re in the middle of an urgent fundraising push --

Our campaign has a lot of momentum on the ground and in the polls, but
we’re still behind on our fundraising goals before tonight’s deadline.

Kamala asked for your help yesterday -- can you step up right now?

the deadline at midnight tonight. We’re so close to getting on track --
help ensure we get caught up so we can win this thing!

Please take a quick moment to read Kamala’s message from yesterday about
why we’re asking you to pitch in today:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

Original Message from Kamala Harris, July 15, 2019

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my
presidential campaign before tomorrow’s mid-month fundraising deadline.
Let me explain why:

After the debate, our campaign surged -- in the polls, with endorsements,
donations, volunteers, and so much more.

It was clear that our message broke through and that millions of Americans
were ready to join our campaign to prosecute the case against four more
years of Donald Trump.

But if we’re not careful, energy and momentum like that can be fleeting.
Our polling numbers doubled in some cases almost overnight, but everything
can turn on a dime if we’re not ready to build an organization that can
win this primary.

Tomorrow at midnight is the first mid-month fundraising deadline we’ve
faced since the debate, and we’re behind where we need to be to hit our
fundraising goals. If we don’t catch up, we won’t be able to capitalize on
this moment.

I cannot do this alone -- it’s going to take thousands of supporters like
you giving what you can to help us win this election, which is why I’m
asking:

Will you rush a contribution to my
campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow?
Anything you pitch in makes a difference:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What I’m thinking about our latest fundraising report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
When I get time on the campaign trail, I like to go for a run. It’s a good way to clear the head and work off all the junk food we eat on the road.
#
When I get time on the campaign trail, I like to go for a run. On Saturday morning, it was a beautiful couple of miles in Merrimack, New Hampshire. It’s always a good way to clear your head and work off any junk food you’ve been eating while on the road.
This campaign is in many ways a lot like a long-distance run. It’s one we’re all on together. And what’s important is whether or not we can build the stamina to make it not just through the next mile, but through the finish line.
Yesterday we shared our second quarter fundraising numbers. They show that we raised $3.6 million in the last few months and $13 million since launching our campaign in March. Out of two-dozen candidates vying for the Democratic nomination, that puts us in the top third. Even more impressive, we’ve done it all without a dime from PACs, lobbyists, corporations, or special interests. It’s 100% people-powered and it always has been. Our average contribution was just $30.
That means we’ve got enough air in the lungs to make it up the next hill and through the next mile of this run. But to be truthful, we need to pick up our pace this quarter to compete with the handful of candidates who outraised us -- including those who were able to double or triple our fundraising. That’s the only way to ensure we have the same resources to spread our message, to meet voters, and to compete in Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, Nevada, Texas, and every state across this country.
[Can I count on you right now to step up with a $3 contribution? Every contribution helps us up our pace and compete with the most well-funded campaigns in this race.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18139?refcode=ema20190716-42862&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=42862%2E444211%2EfmHt5t)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18139?refcode=ema20190716-42862&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=42862%2E444211%2EfmHt5t)**
We don’t necessarily need to be in first place right now. What matters is where we end up heading into those first primaries and caucuses. I’m confident that we have the right message for this moment, we have the best team, and we are ready to take off.
I think about Ruth, who drives up from Massachusetts and goes to every event we hold in New Hampshire. I think about the volunteers we have canvassing in states like Nebraska and Alaska and Tennessee. And I think about our staff, who have picked up their lives to come join our campaign. I’m humbled by all of your contributions, and I carry that support with me every single day.
Thanks for being on this run with me. It means everything to be doing this together.
Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=42862%2E444211%2EfmHt5t). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Mark
subject: I need to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
So far, I've voted to end President Trump's "national emergency" that threatens critical military construction projects in Virginia and around the country. I'm fighting to protect the gains we've made
|
---

| | Derek,

With the 116th Congress well underway, I'm working hard on the issues that matter to Virginians.

So far, I've voted to end President Trump's "national emergency" that threatens critical military construction projects in Virginia and around the country. I'm fighting to protect the gains we've made on healthcare and make sure people with pre-existing conditions continue to have access to quality care. And I'm working on other important issues, from reforming our economy, to improving military housing conditions, to investigating Russian involvement in the 2016 election.

**But I need to hear from you -- what issues do you want to see me working on in the Senate? [Will you take my quick priorities survey to let me know your thoughts?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1e0/53d9897e/51b08f3c/1c8e6b17/3490093100/VEsH/ "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-welc2issues")** **[Take the survey >>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1e0/53d9897e/51b08f3c/1c8e6b17/3490093100/VEsE/ "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-welc2issues")** Thanks,
Mark

It's hard to believe we're already more than halfway through July. But, right now, we're not halfway to our July fundraising goal.

July is the first month after the FEC fundraising deadline, and we want to build on top of the numbers we are really proud of -- when we showed that we can fund a presidential campaign without catering to big money and powerful special interests.

That's why we're reaching out. We need your help to get back on track -- because this grassroots movement is built by you, and by people like you across the country.

**In the last three months, 80 percent of our donors were brand-new -- a great sign that our movement is growing. Our goal is to keep up that pace, but we're behind right now. name: Ken Bray, Former Amazon Worker
subject: [Action] Amazon's Prime Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Our Revolution is partnering with Warehouse Workers for Justice to amplify the stories of under-appreciated warehouse workers and demand immediate change. Please read the story below from a former Amazon warehouse employee in Illinois, [**then sign our petition demanding that Jeff Bezos stop exploiting Amazon workers ->**](https://go.ourrevolution. "https://go.ourrevolution.com/stand-with-workers?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+then+sign+our+petition+demanding+that+Je&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1")
* * *
Friend,

When I got my job at an Amazon warehouse in 2018, I was relieved. Earning a consistent paycheck in my town of Crest Hill, Illinois isn't always a certainty.

But my relief didn't last long.

After nearly a year of feeling under-appreciated as an Amazon warehouse associate, **I received an automated email from Amazon informing me that I was fired.** This came after I'd fallen extremely ill as a result of exposure to unsanitary conditions at the warehouse -- and, despite working the late shift, doubles and taking on the responsibility of training new employees during peak season (often with no advance warning).

Since Amazon refuses to provide health insurance to warehouse associates like me, I was not only sick and unemployed, but I also lacked the necessary support to pay for the mounting pile of bills on my nightstand.
[STAND WITH AMAZON WORKERS](https://go.ourrevolution. "https://go.ourrevolution.com/stand-with-workers?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+STAND+WITH+AMAZON+WORKERS&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1")
[**Can you add your name and tell Jeff Bezos and other wealthy CEOs that you stand in solidarity with under-appreciated workers like myself?**](https://go.ourrevolution. "https://go.ourrevolution.com/stand-with-workers?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+add+your+name+and+tell+Jeff+Bezo&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1")

More often than not, Amazon management treats warehouse workers like emotionless drones in an assembly line -- not human beings with physical limits and aspirations for advancement. **I 'm asking you to add your name because only together, through organized action and fierce determination, can we transform our society into one that values and respects workers' rights:** **[https://go.ourrevolution.com/stand-with-workers](https://go.ourrevolution. "https://go.ourrevolution.com/stand-with-workers?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=4+-+httpsgoourrevolutioncomstandwithworkers&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1")**

Thanks for listening to my story,

Ken Bray
Former Amazon Warehouse Worker
Crest Hill, IL
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a41a/bed43eb/af7a3761/75fa00ba/2927532365/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=5+-+update+your+info&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a41a/bed43eb/af7a3761/75fa00a5/2927532365/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=6+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a41a/bed43eb/af7a3761/75fa00a4/2927532365/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a41a/bed43eb/af7a3761/75fa00a7/2927532365/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=8+-+contributing+to+Our+Revolution+here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_6MO_190716_1_1").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Join us tomorrow night!
body:
Hi Peter!

As the campaign continues, Marc has been meeting with lots of groups and organizations committed to bringing equality, safety, and prosperity to our district. One of these organizations is Jolt.

Jolt is a Texas-based multi-issue organization that builds the political power and influence of Latinos in our democracy.

According to their website:

"Jolt is building a movement of Latinos across Texas to ensure that our community is treated with the respect we deserve. We build the collective voice, power and influence of our community so that our families are treated with equality and dignity."

Marc Flores believes that every voice should be heard, and that it is the responsibility of a representative to ensure that everyone feels represented.
Join us at Marc's house tomorrow night at 6 to hear more about Jolt, meet some of their leadership, and find out how you can get involved! Sign up on our events page below!

Jolt Meet and Greet (https://www.facebook.com/events/404776330128993/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=575ac2a43b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_07_16_02_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-575ac2a43b-32267927)
Thank you for your support!

Marc Flores
