subject: Fox News just admitted:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I'm writing you a long email about my response to President Trump telling four Congresswomen to "go back" to the countries they came from. I'm asking you to read the entire thing. [_**Then, if you 're as disgusted as I am -- consider rushing $15 to ensure I win my Senate race, flip the Senate, and strip this President of his power once and for all. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b514/18e32a7f/573eced9/7bbf1351/3447980344/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190716_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") I'm not afraid to say it: Donald Trump is a racist. And I just went on Fox News to tell him directly -- _I hope he was watching._ **I just heard President Trump tell four Congresswomen and women of color to "go back" to the countries they came from. I'm sick to my stomach.** We are a nation of immigrants and refugees -- and there is no question our Congress has been made better by its diversity. I personally led the charge to take back the House and elect the most diverse Congress in our nation's history. And I won't for a second let President Trump poison our historic progress. I've never been more disgusted. I've never been more appalled. But I've also never been more determined to put this president in his place. **I 'm calling for a MASSIVE response in the next 24 hours to help me win my Senate race, replace Trump's Republican Senate with people of color like me, and render him powerless once and for all.** He must know that we're coming for his Republican Senate. We're going to put an end to his stain of racism. And there's nothing he can do to stop us. I need 2,459 more Democrats to take a stand with $15 before midnight. | Patriot,
Over the last few weeks I have been asking you to protect President Trump from the character assassins at the FBI, the deep-state in DC, and the most corrupt arm of the Democratic Party - the fake news media.
This time I am writing to you because I AM IN NEED OF YOUR HELP!
The socialist-left won't stop until President Trump is impeached and his biggest supporters (people like me, Jim Jordan, and Mark Meadows) are pushed out. I will always hold the line - are you with me?
Will you help me keep FL-1 red?

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Someone spray painted "go back to Africa" on our garage door
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
Not long after I came to Helena as a refugee after fleeing the Liberian civil war, someone spray painted "go back to Africa" on our garage door.
Those words stung -- but our Montana neighbors rallied around us and washed our garage door. I know the true spirit of Montana because the vast majority of Montanans showered my family and I with kindness and generosity. This country gave us an amazing life and I spend every day trying to show my gratitude for this great nation.
But Republican Senator Steve Daines has lost touch with who we are as Americans. After President Trump tweeted hateful comments encouraging four congresswomen of color to "go back" where they came from, Senator Daines rushed to his defense.
[**If you believe that we are better than Senator Daines ' divisiveness and name-calling, contribute $5 now to join our movement to defeat him.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190716&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
While three of the congresswomen President Trump attacked were born in the U.S., Congresswoman Ilhan Omar was born in Somalia and came here as a refugee. Like her, I came to the U.S. seeking freedom and opportunity.
After arriving in Montana, I served this country for over 20 years in the U.S. Armed Forces and have sought to contribute to my community any way I can. Does Senator Daines think I should "go back to where I came from" too?
Whatever Senator Daines thinks, we aren't going anywhere. I will continue to serve this country until the day I die, along with so many other refugees and children of immigrants who love this country.
While Senator Daines is trying to distract Montanans from his atrocious record on issues like health care and public lands, we are focusing on fixing problems.
[**We deserve better leadership in Washington than we 're seeing from Senator Daines. Contribute $5 to defeat him and flip this Senate seat.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190716&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot
**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190716&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616475e/1e3760f0/69e856ad/5f7ea02d/1231622256/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). To change your email address or update your contact info, [click here.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616475e/1e3760f0/69e856ad/5f7ea02a/1231622256/VEsD/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/update-your-contact-info?source=footer") [Make a contribution now to elect Wilmot Collins as Montana's next U.S. Senator.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616475e/1e3760f0/69e856ad/5f7ea02b/1231622256/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=footer")

name: John Kasich
subject: Here's why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Even in times of failing leadership and division, what makes America great is that each of us has the power to make a difference in our own communitie [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=6a28926083dc47218dd4602d4037c8a9&_e=c6jh_bTqVpTlNIscdt-kbvR714oYnAmEABGpcobeAtFbDMsReZ3PEZUW1OY5F32fM4VIIgoZoQPRdi1QbHIni5CS7s7Hmy09vtajyi_ANKGdsucMOYO1w6WONZz_B273Y0Wd4SYcP7GGeThIJfxffIcuvD9AI-SjKnwWsRsGlEYe_yNsc96_PIbZrNNcO5FXQDv13B1iMjkqAJY4tpXbEB9KGF0FD6VRY-TJzTCQzpWgRSvuveb7A54cHBbRHwrfLR6oAseWFb298HDAeSsEig%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - It seems like every time I speak out against hate and division, people think it's part of some political agenda or that it means I'm running for office. I may run again but that's not why I speak out.

I'll be honest with you. I dislike getting asked every day to comment on the latest Trump-crisis. I'd much rather talk about the things that bind us together and the great power of the American people to enact change.

But when I do weigh in, it's because I aim to be a voice of reason in a time when too few leaders are working to unify us and many more are dividing us.

**We should all be upset**. **But being upset isn't enough**. It's a call to action for each of us to think about how we can do better in our own lives and interactions with other people.

Can we be kinder? Can we be more understanding? Can we focus on those things that bind us together rather than those that divide us?

I believe we can and that is why I speak out.

If you believe in this mission and you want to help us grow our audience, [please consider making a generous donation](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=6a28926083dc47218dd4602d4037c8a9&_e=c6jh_bTqVpTlNIscdt-kbvkWT1rPNWw2i0OyqpdLc3IiBaU1JESo5ov_DGxFzVpa_FVYcUYCeLBKhFY33A0YeHdNoN6U8Ij3zkY8uw0uVHZK9wCokVnjO_dPzQeo8zdw5i9GJMV7bWfS796x7u8wxDSRiCZKCum9g8UKBtNdClG2nPqx01o_r7yGRR03pX2YsgUsBKHrK1S1NTDlM9G5wgoY9U_ApaMy0BRktU8HkDUtsjXdSS5Fa7irlAXeKvP5j_FCE6h8jwcWfCerHvKJMA%3D%3D) to support this organization.
[ **DONATE $25 >** ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=6a28926083dc47218dd4602d4037c8a9&_e=c6jh_bTqVpTlNIscdt-kbvkWT1rPNWw2i0OyqpdLc3IM6Q5JGQxdxRARX3VKphPzyPrkU5qFP9YubGNgHk_4JH5YqdbfAtd0XJDIeWLE3FqxVwnb71SnK17inA5TFm8SfsTUcVhV_Mpsvx6E5C1FwObAEKRJ_H6dYS1ptNFP6XbbbZ9cmKV_sdbNSP0lUQihZZ8mgELVLtAj9DvDybihtcFYxXSClhdkBReew9JSabqJ1AkXWCispas1OYNQFheqlvLcSBhGIYTTb1HG6zF8TXaQFTiF2yngJuyiBRerJHs%3D)
[**DONATE $50 >**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=6a28926083dc47218dd4602d4037c8a9&_e=c6jh_bTqVpTlNIscdt-kbvkWT1rPNWw2i0OyqpdLc3IM6Q5JGQxdxRARX3VKphPzFeW2U1nhRUpIRKjm3ZWzP0YXVwI_ovq15zZH2STQDgfvFwBr_u4EwrhVaBkP34v2ZrelAyvpu2rMmLtfdHO2P0yY4vogDgO0wZnf5iHGJ3_ypzpx_uqSvlezt23VGHUlAwvhD7uM7lSmrVPzsM0-iCsX4gEurxuWRzUy1YIESuVb5-dC1foYhcM_oaINTHMnrLm9cOpfTGYesB6ry9lr-bl92bCUxPcPBm_IaVrXeaY%3D)
[**DONATE $100 >**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=6a28926083dc47218dd4602d4037c8a9&_e=c6jh_bTqVpTlNIscdt-kbvkWT1rPNWw2i0OyqpdLc3IM6Q5JGQxdxRARX3VKphPzxBpWgz7N8Hfs8mzrwlHkugOxz40nj1XyIXKJgn3aormpK8nXu7-VgPCAL2laYTNnS0P8PqcVEgNo2aA8lZDuJN7GuuyjBV1MlXGhufmUHEoPi80zZqwR4XfZ5q9DHB-M2j9UVhnsWzHhxMj_hlHoQIrnwtnkJmFnhc0ZGW4_vGDjo_Be5Hlb9gtOoobt4PRfekdiA1DKkOy9CjpcrONQpqnHAjSPP8dxFBnS1STcl4I%3D)
Even in times of failing leadership and division, what makes America great is that each of us has the power to make a difference in our own communities. We are all flawed - every one of us. But it's up to each of us to do what we can to honor that sacred duty as an American.

Thank you.

-John

[ **Hear from Hoosiers - Watch Video** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=50e07ef5d2ac408d9dded7f1513a21e1&_e=rEICmRweL8OUbeERI4N3fe-5AAHSvJ9RFvcyAiNfIcTD9l9WGl5aJn29n--g_UYVPdvUuPyfaSR5eh1KNAbzAeDyEFfn2bIVkibet8nARvvDw4d7mdj-g89j5GgyrUJTt27PHLT7ZYgu6uPb1WdLlEPmdoUSQbr9qiG9I78DtXiBzrykoKyEgBM2askqpEjRoT2-u1xzx0CCv0R-FizYVPNxCiRGNd6UpvtU9ufvHg3q6zFXmQil3Vgl04JQ5zq85JoWGgwY0N9R5g1xzretv2ZHRJFJ9nr-QfC5jGwkTjGJRRyX27VBoGC97ZTz9PGMltA5W-ALTeiGha6SAXgFRAwrZoscYqf_8MwXxRVq7Nqmu709XAC32xnG4_l50UOPM3dW4Db04tMKqmEJJ4Xz5iG8YslpV7P_DsaZi0FxZPA%3D)
**Hoosiers from all walks of life agree: Governor Holcomb is a different kind of leader.**

**That’s because Governor Holcomb listens, rolls up his sleeves, and takes action.** Since Governor Holcomb’s election in 2016, Indiana has gone onward and upward. You name it -- from the economy, to job creation, to infrastructure, to public health, to education.

He’s making a difference and positively impacting the lives of Hoosiers all over our great state. **Indiana is stronger because Governor Holcomb is Putting People First.**

**At Saturday’s big event, we debuted a video we’d love for you to watch. And just like the rest of our campaign, it’s centered on real Hoosiers and their real stories.[Take a watch, and consider sharing it with your friends and family.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=50e07ef5d2ac408d9dded7f1513a21e1&_e=rEICmRweL8OUbeERI4N3fe-5AAHSvJ9RFvcyAiNfIcTD9l9WGl5aJn29n--g_UYVPdvUuPyfaSR5eh1KNAbzAeDyEFfn2bIVkibet8nARvvDw4d7mdj-g89j5GgyrUJTt27PHLT7ZYgu6uPb1WdLlEPmdoUSQbr9qiG9I78DtXiBzrykoKyEgBM2askqpEjRoT2-u1xzx0CCv0R-FizYVDwzykJRGuQB2QGFu7Q4t94d07f5M2OBXaKBXDbpHfpe8BC5XH3T7RkT4eEb7liY0QPi8PlQULG9lDei_icMYURuf6qQquCyQyXQ70RrULW81-iyF7N2SPkB0kQaCN_Ktv82ChyLRsALAHl1Ll4xdQCESNTZDtxcYcLrlFcY66P_PPNRkH3mIMEjHjyD_uBDJ8IutK6xmtmijZUoP8Nicbc%3D)**
[ **Spread the word about the future of Indiana** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=50e07ef5d2ac408d9dded7f1513a21e1&_e=rEICmRweL8OUbeERI4N3fe-5AAHSvJ9RFvcyAiNfIcTD9l9WGl5aJn29n--g_UYVPdvUuPyfaSR5eh1KNAbzAeDyEFfn2bIVkibet8nARvvDw4d7mdj-g89j5GgyrUJTt27PHLT7ZYgu6uPb1WdLlEPmdoUSQbr9qiG9I78DtXiBzrykoKyEgBM2askqpEjRoT2-u1xzx0CCv0R-FizYVIb73oUfp-dV3gGpzOa0K0Q_CQY01BCjn6fYJnolbJoXr0EQeO9P7C6ipi_NPlSztbA8IGYYmzHtHaiQQjVE7BG7kIOdM-jXnLVkkTs1j4Ajm185G6xd8Ww00B1D_Tq5FsdAD4iyUas39wL29iSGBAEfPdxVa5x-YuyoBaNcJb5RbQ7y3FvqwTjsRQ_U7BmhYEtI3eiYYI6Uxtt7nmbT-BY%3D)

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: How we'll win Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
I wanted to shoot you a note from Iowa, where I've been making my case to voters face to face, as well as enjoying the local cooking--most recently, at Progress Iowa's Corn Feed in Cedar Rapids Sunday | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771747/691c9bd/6d0481c5/11a47dfe/3344775956/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, I wanted to shoot you a note from Iowa, where I've been making my case to voters face to face, as well as enjoying the local cooking--most recently, at Progress Iowa's Corn Feed in Cedar Rapids Sunday afternoon.

(Can I take a moment to get nerdy about corn? The brewer in me wants you to know that, as early as 1587, Virginia colonists were fermenting ale from corn. In Cedar Rapids, the menu included everything from Mexican grilled corn to corn casserole to cornbread. This plant really has so many possibilities living inside it.)

**On a serious note, it 's been really good to be on the ground out here, recommitting to the values that drive this campaign:** [**_listening, learning, and bringing people together in a spirit of collaboration to end our crisis of division._**](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190716_JH_20190716-fr-JH-corn-ndnr_ndnr_l1&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

You'll be hearing a lot of opinions about this race for the next seven months. But at the end of the day, the opinions of the people of Iowa, New Hampshire, and other early states mean a lot.

Their concerns, their experiences and their hopes and dreams are what will ultimately set the course of this primary. Not pundits, not reporters, _not_ political chatter.

Instead, it's time on porches, in living rooms, in diners and libraries, at fairgrounds and factories and communal feasts like the one this weekend. Time spent truly connecting with people, truly listening, truly learning and evolving.

That's what will build the relationships that take us across the finish line in this race.

[**_If you agree, chip in now to help my team build our operation in Iowa and other early states so we can do the work that will truly pay off in 2020._**](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190716_JH_20190716-fr-JH-corn-ndnr_ndnr_l1&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190716_JH_20190716-fr-JH-corn-ndnr_ndnr_b5&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190716_JH_20190716-fr-JH-corn-ndnr_ndnr_b50&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. Thank you,
John ****** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771747/691c9bd/6d0481c5/11a47df0/3344775956/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Jaime Harrison (personal)
subject: Lindsey Graham's apathy is disgusting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Peter, Lindsey Graham's apathy is disgusting. Lindsey Graham may not care about families at the border, but I do.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter, **Lindsey Graham 's apathy is disgusting.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d071a/72412298/4387f0bb/6102057d/2503826665/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdGhhcnJpc29uMiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMTkwNzE2X0hhcnJpc29uU3Vycm9nYXRlX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_splitharrison2?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190716_HarrisonSurrogate_U1_X1&amount=&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190716_HarrisonSurrogate_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190716_HarrisonSurrogate_U1_X1") Lindsey Graham may not care about families at the border, but I do. These are children and families seeking a better life. They deserve to be treated fairly and humanely. We have laws, but we also have hearts. It's time for fresh leadership to bring back basic humanity to our enforcement of immigration laws. It's time for Senator Graham to go, Peter. name: Team Kamala
body:
$108 million.

That’s how much Donald Trump raised in the most recent quarterly
fundraising period.

This whopping fundraising haul is huge and daunting, but it doesn’t mean
that we give up and call it quits -- not after all the ground we’ve gained
for Kamala this year.

It means that we need to push harder to break through the noise and make
sure that Kamala reaches more undecided voters to share our vision for the
country.

Will you pitch in right now to support our campaign before our next
fundraising deadline at midnight tonight?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1002&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1003&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1004&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Another Amount

This one is gonna hurt -- but we all remember 2016. We were riding high on
the wave of progress from Obama and ready to continue onward with Hillary.
Instead, a divisive president was elected -- a man who called for a Muslim
ban, said white supremacists were “very fine people” after
Charlottesville, tried to rip away healthcare from millions of Americans,
and so much more.

We
can’t afford another four more years of Trump -- that’s why Kamala is
fighting so hard to prove that only one candidate in this race knows how
to prosecute the case against his whole Administration.

Many candidates in this primary will panic at his number, but our team?
We’re preparing. We’re ready to go toe-to-toe with Trump. First, we need
to catch up to his fundraising pace.

But we can’t do it alone -- we need your help. Will you step up right now
to add more fuel to our fight? You can pitch in below:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1007&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1008&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1009&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1010&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1011&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190716-mm?refcode=ema190716-mm-6-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1012&refcode2=5594_5755789_FGSkXY&akid=5594%2E5755789%2EFGSkXY ]Another Amount

We mean it when we say it will take all of us working together to take
down Trump and reclaim our country.

Thanks for all you do.

— Team Kamala

name: Dan Baer
subject: RE: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Time and time again we've seen Cory Gardner act as an accessory to Trump's most vile behavior, and this week was no exception.
|
---

| | I'm about to ask you to read a long email about Donald Trump's vile tweets attacking four Congresswomen of color with racist, threatening rhetoric.

Time and time again we've seen my opponent Cory Gardner act as an accessory to Trump's most vile behavior, and this week was no exception.

**[I'm humbly asking you to consider pitching in $19 to my campaign to flip the Senate and hold Trump accountable. >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8264c/232dfd1/9a55dfa/62a11de8/333576976/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190716_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

Frankly, I'm outraged.

This week alone:

I've watched Trump's administration conduct hostile raids and rip immigrant families from their homes.

I've watched him spew racist rhetoric at four Congresswomen of color.

And I've watched in disgust as he doubled-down on it.

**Point blank: Donald Trump is a heartless racist.**

And we need to immediately hold him accountable for his actions -- something Republicans have failed to do.

My Republican opponent Cory Gardner has had ample time to condemn Trump's comments.

He hasn't. He's ducked and dodged and refused to stand up to Trump. He's got to go.

And I need your help to do it.

Can you be one of the 100 Democrats I need to take a stand before midnight? Your $19 would go a long way to ensuring we have a Democratic Senate that will stand up to Donald Trump:
| | [**Donate $19 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8264c/232dfd1/9a55dfa/62a11de8/333576976/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190716_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $35 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8264c/232dfd1/9a55dfa/62a11de9/333576976/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190716_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=35&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $50 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8264c/232dfd1/9a55dfa/62a11dee/333576976/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190716_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=50&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $100 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8264c/232dfd1/9a55dfa/62a11def/333576976/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190716_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=100&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate another amount now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8264c/232dfd1/9a55dfa/62a11dec/333576976/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190716_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

When I was a U.S. Ambassador, I saw similar vile, racist rhetoric hurled at Jews, Muslims, and other religious, racial and ethnic groups around the world. Defending American values means when attacks like these happen, abroad or at home, they can't be given a pass -- they have to be called out and condemned.

Thanks for taking a stand,

Dan

|
---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8264c/232dfd1/9a55dfa/62a11ded/333576976/VEsB/ "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8264c/232dfd1/9a55dfa/62a11d92/333576976/VEsO/ "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Dan for Colorado
PO Box 1199
Denver, CO 80201

| | Paid for by Dan for Colorado

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: I need 20,000 signatures condemning white supremacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
Will you sign your name alongside mine and go on the record to denounce Donald Trump's racism? Let's reach 20,000 signatures strong by midnight. >> | | |
---
| |
---
| | | I'm not afraid to say it: The disgusting words coming from Donald Trump are indistinguishable from those of a white supremacist.

**But you 're about to help me send him a historic response of opposition.** [_**In this critical moment, I 'm personally asking you to sign your name and officially go on the record to denounce this president. This is a fight for the soul of our nation. Will you help me reach 20,000 signatures strong to denounce him? >> **_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce77/3eb3e2fc/58b8e1a3/744a7325/192367363/VEsH/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/condemn-trump-survey?source=20190716_em_pet_b1_castro_all") ****NAME: ****dpwillis67@gmail.com**** | **[Sign your name >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce77/3eb3e2fc/58b8e1a3/744a7325/192367363/VEsE/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/condemn-trump-survey?source=20190716_em_pet_b1_castro_all")**
---

I need to make one thing very clear.

Donald Trump's attacks against our Congresswomen of color are not only vile. They're not only racist.

**They are the attacks of a white supremacist. **

So I just need to ask you one thing:

Are we going to let Donald Trump succeed in smearing the very soul of our nation...

...or are we going to rise up with an overwhelming show of opposition to denounce him?

[_**I 'm asking you to join me in this critical moment and meet Donald Trump's racism head on with a historic response. Add your name and help me reach 20,000 signatures before midnight denouncing the racist in our oval office. >> **_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce77/3eb3e2fc/58b8e1a3/744a7325/192367363/VEsF/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/condemn-trump-survey?source=20190716_em_pet_b1_castro_all")

My grandmother came to this country from Mexico when she was 7 years old.

She worked as a maid. She was told on countless occasions to "go back to Mexico."

But even still, she took such pride in this country.

Two generations later, her grandson is running for President.

**I 'm proof that when Americans rise up and denounce hatred, no one -- not even a racist president like Donald Trump -- can win. **

I'm asking you to fight today like you've never fought before.

Not just for candidates of color like me.

But for kids of every race, creed, and religion who are listening.

This is a fight for the soul of our nation, and how we respond in this critical moment will shape it.

_**[So I 'm asking: Will you sign your name alongside mine and go on the record to denounce Donald Trump's racism? Let's reach 20,000 signatures strong by midnight. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce77/3eb3e2fc/58b8e1a3/744a7325/192367363/VEsC/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/condemn-trump-survey?source=20190716_em_pet_b1_castro_all")**_

Thank you,

Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce77/3eb3e2fc/58b8e1a3/744a7324/192367363/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce77/3eb3e2fc/58b8e1a3/744a7323/192367363/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce77/3eb3e2fc/58b8e1a3/744a7322/192367363/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce77/3eb3e2fc/58b8e1a3/744a7321/192367363/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce77/3eb3e2fc/58b8e1a3/744a7320/192367363/VEsP/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce77/3eb3e2fc/58b8e1a3/744a732f/192367363/VEsHBQ/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

| The pundits are pointing to the polls to try and count Michael out.

Here's the truth: [Recent history has shown us that early frontrunners aren't the ultimate winners in presidential races.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad56/134673f2/f946782/6996844e/493665837/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_071619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

In August 2003, Joe Lieberman was leading the pack. In a matter of months, John Kerry went from a low-polling long shot to the de facto Democratic nominee.

Barack Obama was trailing by double digits until he won the Iowa Caucus.

These early polls weren't predictive of how things would develop and change on the campaign trail over the course of weeks and months.

[With your support, we're proving that Michael is just getting started.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad56/134673f2/f946782/6996844e/493665837/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_071619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

The next debate qualifying deadline is midnight TONIGHT.

[**That 's why today, we're counting on your support. Will you rush a donation right now ahead of tonight's deadline? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad56/134673f2/f946782/6996844e/493665837/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_071619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:
We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed! | | |
No no no, team. We just checked our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

[](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-weekly?refcode=EM-071619_2&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_**[Help Ed reach our $10,000 goal by donating $10 or more before midnight!](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-weekly?refcode=EM-071619_2&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
If we don't reach our goal this week, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

| | This past weekend, I had a chance to sit down with Washington Governor Jay Inslee for the inaugural episode of _2020 Questions _- my new webseries hosting informal but in-depth conversations with the Democrats who are running for our nation's highest office. **[Tune in today](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd23/6cd27893/4f2907f6/1580a7aa/1132889158/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/JeffMerkleyOregon/posts/2741594849192922") **at 5 p.m. Pacific (8 p.m. Eastern) to get the rundown on the issues that really matter, like how to tackle our climate crisis, how to make democracy work again, and whether pineapple on pizza is actually good! [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd23/6cd27893/4f2907f6/1580a7aa/1132889158/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/JeffMerkleyOregon/posts/2741594849192922") **[Watch our chat and join the conversation on Facebook.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd23/6cd27893/4f2907f6/1580a7aa/1132889158/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/JeffMerkleyOregon/posts/2741594849192922")** _**Jeff**_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd23/6cd27893/4f2907f6/1580a7ab/1132889158/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-07-16-2020inslee&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd23/6cd27893/4f2907f6/1580a7a8/1132889158/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-07-16-2020inslee&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd23/6cd27893/4f2907f6/1580a7a9/1132889158/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-07-16-2020inslee&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dd23/6cd27893/4f2907f6/1580a7a6/1132889158/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-07-16-2020inslee&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Joan=20Perry?=
subject: Grateful and humbled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joan Perry for Congress, All rights reserved
body:
I want you to know how very grateful I am for your support during this amazing adventure. | | | | [ ](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=a3c6ba7243&e=0bf1d0f47f)
---
| | | Peter,

When I started this journey a few months ago, several of you said to me, “ _What are you thinking?_ ”

As you know, I’ve never stepped forward to run for office before, but Jimbo and I believe we were called to expand our service to you and all of our community.

Over these 5 months, it has been my privilege to travel throughout the 17 counties of this district, meeting the wonderful men and women of our communities, listening to your concerns, your fears, your hopes, and your dreams.

>From Moyock to Hubert, from Farmville to Englehard, I’ve met amazing people who have impacted my life forever.

Your stories of resilience, personal responsibility, and love for your neighbors is what **makes me proud to call Eastern North Carolina home.**

As I shared often throughout the campaign, when the NY legislature expanded late-term abortion, and the Virginia governor defended infanticide, **I knew I had to step forward**.

As a mom, a Christian, and a pediatrician, I believe Congress needs a voice speaking for the unborn. And we must continue to do so, in whatever ways we can.

If you’re like me, when you watch the evening news or read the local papers, you find yourself bombarded with an endless stream of violence, poverty, abuse, and hopelessness.

**I cannot help but believe the answers do not lie in the government’s ability to provide more services, but rather in our ability to foster more opportunities and better chances for success.**

Dependency is the tool of the Democratic Party and is historically the downfall of nations.

**We as Republicans must always be the people of opportunity.**

I am a conservative and believe conservative principles will create a strong America, with strong families. These principles are found in Scripture and find expression in our Constitution.

I believe the heroes in our history are not the politicians, but you, the hardworking men and women who strive each day to make life a little better for yourselves, your families, and your communities.

We were made to be free, and when unleashed to pursue our dreams and aspirations, the possibilities are limitless – we can never underestimate the power of individuals desiring to work for themselves and their families to provide for a better tomorrow.

It is the opportunity to have meaningful work and earn a fair wage which promotes self-esteem, self-reliance, respect for others, and eternal hope.

Jimbo and I are praying about our next steps and I’ll be happy to share those with you as God gives us more clarity.

I want you to know how very grateful I am for your support during this amazing adventure.

I’m truly humbled by the efforts and sacrifices of new and old friends who supported us in so many ways -- from hosting events, to making phone calls, to knocking on doors, to donating to our campaign. We are certain that we could never have held up during these 4 intense months without the fervent prayers of our prayer team who consistently lifted us day after day.

God has been faithful to answer those prayers.

He met every need we encountered, many times in ways we never expected. I look forward to sharing some of these amazing God moments with you in the future.

**So now, more than ever, I believe our God is sovereign and good. I trust His hand in leading us and I look forward to walking with Him wherever that may go.**

I’m encouraged by what I’ve seen in our citizens. In a world filled with turmoil, negativity and cynicism, there is a strong group of conservatives, undergirded by their faith, who are working hard to create a brighter future.

I wish Dr. Murphy all the best as he continues to serve this area. We Republicans must unite behind our shared beliefs. We can’t allow the liberal agenda to win the election in September, so I encourage you all to help his campaign in whatever way you see fit.

Thank you again,

PS: If you would like to fund our last few days' activities, you can chip in to cover our final expenses below. Thank you!
---
